title: Create Air Fabric
description: Addon for Create that add compatibility with Thin Air, Ad Astra
body:
# Create Air Fabric

[![Discord](https://img.shields.io/discord/1169615451291140146?style=for-the-badge&logo=discord&logoColor=%23ffffff&labelColor=%23002244&color=%23003366)](https://discord.gg/gBB8uRJA8g)
[![Gitea](https://img.shields.io/badge/gitea-0?style=for-the-badge&logo=gitea&labelColor=%23002244&color=%23003366)](https://git.bitheaven.ru/BitHeaven/create-air-fabric)

### Addon for Create that add compatibility with Thin Air, Ad Astra.

## Thin Air
In "Bad Air" using oxygen from backtank.

## Ad Astra
On planets without oxygen using oxygen from backtank. Hot planets safe with netherite equipment.

------
Forge version for Thin Air: https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/create-air-forge
